findings.location: s1 — opening paragraph (source: document-level intro before 年月日コンバータ section)
findings.description: The source intro explicitly states two customization paths: (1) for validators use :ref:`add-validation-method`, (2) for converters use extendedStringConvertors. The knowledge file reproduces only the converter path and silently drops the validator path. A developer asking 'how do I add a custom validator?' in the context of this page would not be directed to the correct resource.
findings.source_evidence: バリデータについて下記に示す精査仕様とは異なる精査を行う場合は、バリデータの場合は :ref:`add-validation-method` 、コンバータの場合は :ref:`StringConvertor<stringconvertor-setting>` のextendedStringConvertors欄をそれぞれ参照して個別にバリデータまたはコンバータを追加すること。
